_doc: Curated IC YouTube channels checked alongside the search-discovery pass. The 'handle' is the @-handle from the channel page; resolved at runtime via YouTube Data API.
_verification_run: Verified 2026-05-10 against 30d and 365d windows. Channels below all resolve via forHandle and publish IC-relevant video on at least an occasional cadence. Channels below in '_dropped' were tested and rejected (handle didn't resolve, channel was a namesake/false positive, or cadence was effectively zero).
_search_vs_channels_tradeoff: Channels are doing nearly all the useful work in this pipeline. Even narrowed DEFAULT_QUERIES return mostly tangential content (MOOC lectures, generic platform listicles). Treat search hits as a weak supplement; treat channel uploads as the primary IC signal.

channels.why: IABC — practitioner association; high cadence (10+ videos/30d, conference previews, master classes)
Staffbase official — competitor signal; 4 videos/30d incl. product webinars and Trendmonitor IK launches
Ragan Communications — flagship IC trade publication; very high cadence, AI-in-comms and tool-adoption content. Note: '@Raganinc' does NOT resolve

Workshop (IC email tool) — competitor signal; weekly IC-craft videos ('How to create employee influencers', 'four tools to run IC well'). Note: '@Workshop' and '@withworkshop' do NOT resolve — must use '@useworkshop'
Poppulo — competitor signal; product + IC strategy content ('Misalignment Tax', digital signage)
Workvivo (Zoom) — competitor signal; Vivowire podcast and product launches. Note: '@Workvivo' and '@WorkvivoOfficial' do NOT resolve — must use '@Workvivobyzoom'
Simpplr — competitor signal; lower cadence (1 video/30d) but high-value when posted (Comms AI launch announcement)
Haiilo — competitor signal; product + customer-story videos, mix of EN/DE
LumApps — competitor signal; LOW cadence (last upload Oct 2025) but keep for major product/customer-story drops
ContactMonkey — competitor signal; 0 videos in last 30d but historically posts product/webinar content; keep and monitor
Firstup — competitor signal; VERY LOW cadence (~1 video/365d) but worth keeping for any release video. Note: '@Firstup' does NOT resolve — must use '@Firstup-io'

_dropped.reason: Resolves, but is Axios news media (politics/general news) — NOT AxiosHQ the IC newsletter product.

Handle does not resolve via forHandle. AxiosHQ has a channel (id UCq60_5Tu5wX6IfCrraqnmKg) but no @-handle the API can look up. Excluded until handle is set or script is extended to accept channel IDs.
Resolves, but channel owner is real-estate agent Brittany Davis — NOT Davis & Company the IC consultancy.
Resolves but has zero recent uploads (Davis & Company appears to publish web workshops, not YouTube).
